title: Aureline history-edit review vocabulary
description: Boundary schema for the history_edit_review_record family frozen in docs/vcs/history_edit_and_recovery_contract.md. One history_edit_review_record pins one high-trust history-edit review surface (history_edit_review_class drawn from the closed five-value vocabulary covering interactive_rebase_sequence_review, cherry_pick_onto_alternate_target_review, revert_commit_preview_review, patch_series_restack_review, and single_branch_history_edit_review) plus the per-review object-model change class (object_model_change_class drawn from the closed four-value vocabulary covering rewrite-history, append-new-revert-commit, replay-onto-new-target, and pick-in-place-no-change), the publish / merge-queue / review-id impact summary fields, the auto-continue gating state, the conflict / resume state explicit, the cited recovery_object_record_id_ref before any non-pick admission, and the parent ordered_sequence_step_id_refs chain into schemas/vcs/sequence_step.schema.json. One history_edit_review_audit_event_record carries the closed denial-reason and event-id vocabularies. The record is the boundary every reviewer reads to tell what object-model change a history-edit operation will produce, what publish / merge-queue / review-id impact it carries, and what recovery object exists before confirm; auto-continue is structurally blocked while conflicts, protected-path blockers, missing signoff, or changed base / head identity remain unresolved. Raw absolute paths, raw branch / commit URLs, raw author identity strings, raw commit message bodies, raw patch bodies, raw run-log bodies, raw approval-ticket bodies, raw notebook cell text, raw terminal bytes, and raw URLs MUST NOT appear on any record emitted against this schema; the record carries opaque ids, typed vocabulary, redaction-aware reviewable labels (<= 1024 graphemes), and policy / lifecycle state only. The eventual git-service crate's Rust types are the schema of record; this file is the cross-tool boundary every non-owning surface reads. Adding a new record kind, history_edit_review_class, history_edit_review_lifecycle_state, object_model_change_class, publish_impact_class, merge_queue_impact_class, review_id_impact_class, auto_continue_state_class, denial reason, or audit-event id is additive-minor and bumps history_edit_review_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

history_edit_review_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for the history-edit-review vocabulary. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

reviewable_label.description: Redaction-aware reviewable label (<= 1024 graphemes). Carries a presentation-only summary for support / audit; never carries the raw payload.

policy_context.description: Policy context the record was minted under.

object_model_change_class.description: Re-exported verbatim from schemas/vcs/sequence_step.schema.json. The review row pins the dominant change class for the whole review (a multi-step rewrite-history review pins object_model_rewrite_history even when individual steps are pick-in-place); the per-step row pins the change class for that step alone.

auto_continue_state_class.description: Re-exported verbatim from schemas/vcs/sequence_step.schema.json. The review row pins the aggregate auto-continue state across every step; the per-step row pins the step-local state. The schema's allOf gates pair the lifecycle states with the matching aggregate auto-continue state so a reviewer can read the gate from the review row alone.

history_edit_review_class.description: Frozen history-edit review vocabulary. interactive_rebase_sequence_review covers a full sequence-editor plan (pick / reword / edit / squash / fixup / drop / exec / break / label / reset / merge_replay) authored against a target branch or worktree. cherry_pick_onto_alternate_target_review covers cherry-pick of one or more commits onto an alternate target / base. revert_commit_preview_review covers a non-rewriting revert that appends a new commit. patch_series_restack_review covers stack-wide restack of a patch_stack onto a new base. single_branch_history_edit_review covers an ad-hoc single-step history edit (e.g. a one-shot reword) that does not bind to a multi-step plan.

history_edit_review_lifecycle_state.description: Frozen review lifecycle vocabulary. review_drafted_pending_confirm is the row at mint before the user has confirmed; recovery_object_record_id_ref MAY be null only at this state. review_admitted_pending_run is the row after confirm; recovery_object_record_id_ref MUST be non-null. The four review_paused_* states pair through allOf with the matching auto_continue_blocked_* state and forbid auto-continue. review_completed_recovery_object_minted and review_aborted_rolled_back_to_recovery_object are terminal. review_archived_tombstone is the long-tail tombstone state.

publish_impact_class.description: Frozen publish-impact vocabulary describing what the review's confirm will change at the remote authority. publish_impact_local_only_no_remote_publish is the default for local-only history edits. publish_impact_force_push_required_to_existing_remote names the case where the rewrite will require a force push (the most common rewrite-history case against an already-pushed branch); the review row MUST cite the protected-path / signoff blockers explicitly when the remote is protected. publish_impact_new_branch_publish_only covers a cherry-pick or restack onto a brand new remote branch. publish_impact_remote_unaffected_revert_only covers an append-new-revert-commit review. publish_impact_blocked_by_protected_branch_policy denies admission to confirm at the schema level until the protected_path_blocker_class on the parent steps clears.

merge_queue_impact_class.description: Frozen merge-queue impact vocabulary describing what the review's confirm will do to an in-flight merge-queue pipeline. merge_queue_impact_no_review_open is the default. merge_queue_impact_review_open_will_invalidate_pipeline names the case where the pipeline must restart (the rewrite changes the head). merge_queue_impact_review_open_will_drift_base_only names the case where only the base advanced (a cherry-pick / restack that does not touch the head). merge_queue_impact_review_open_blocked_by_queue_freeze denies admission at the schema level until the queue freeze clears.

review_id_impact_class.description: Frozen review-id impact vocabulary describing what the review's confirm will do to an open provider review (PR / MR / change-list). review_id_impact_no_review_open is the default. review_id_impact_will_preserve_review_id covers an append-revert that the provider treats as new commits on the same review. review_id_impact_will_invalidate_review_id_new_id_required covers a rewrite-history review against a provider that recreates the review on force-push. review_id_impact_will_orphan_existing_review_thread covers a replay-onto-new-target review that abandons the existing review thread.

history_edit_review_denial_reason.description: Frozen denial-reason vocabulary on the history_edit_review audit stream.

history_edit_review_audit_event_id.description: Frozen audit-event ids on the history_edit_review stream. history_edit_review_audit_denial_emitted MUST cite a history_edit_review_denial_reason.

target_base_identity_ref.description: Opaque ref to the base identity the review is rooted on at admission. Always non-null.

replay_target_base_identity_ref.description: Opaque ref to the alternate target base identity the review replays onto. Required (non-null) when history_edit_review_class is cherry_pick_onto_alternate_target_review or patch_series_restack_review (denies with history_edit_review_replay_target_base_identity_required_for_replay_class); null otherwise.

target_change_object_id_refs.description: Opaque refs to the change_object_record rows the review targets. Non-empty for cherry-pick / revert / single-branch reviews; may be empty for an interactive_rebase_sequence_review whose targets are tracked through the sequence-editor operation rows instead.

target_patch_stack_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the patch_stack_record (schemas/vcs/patch_stack.schema.json) the review operates on. Required (non-null) when history_edit_review_class is patch_series_restack_review; null on other classes unless the review happens to operate on a known stack.

target_sequence_editor_plan_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the sequence_editor_plan_record (schemas/vcs/patch_stack.schema.json) backing this review. Required (non-null) when history_edit_review_class is interactive_rebase_sequence_review; null otherwise.

ordered_sequence_step_id_refs.description: Opaque refs to sequence_step_record rows (schemas/vcs/sequence_step.schema.json) in the order they will execute. Non-empty for interactive_rebase_sequence_review and patch_series_restack_review; may be a single-element list on cherry_pick / revert / single-branch reviews.

recovery_object_record_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the recovery_object_record (schemas/vcs/recovery_object.schema.json) pinned at review admission. Required (non-null) when history_edit_review_lifecycle_state is anything other than review_drafted_pending_confirm (denies with history_edit_review_recovery_object_required_before_admission).

approval_ticket_ref.description: Opaque ref to the approval-ticket row admitting the review. Required (non-null) when history_edit_review_lifecycle_state is anything other than review_drafted_pending_confirm (denies with history_edit_review_attribution_missing).

completed_at.description: Required (non-null) when history_edit_review_lifecycle_state is review_completed_recovery_object_minted. Null otherwise.

aborted_at.description: Required (non-null) when history_edit_review_lifecycle_state is review_aborted_rolled_back_to_recovery_object. Null otherwise.

archived_at.description: Required (non-null) when history_edit_review_lifecycle_state is review_archived_tombstone. Null otherwise.

allOf.description: Every lifecycle past review_drafted_pending_confirm MUST cite a non-null recovery_object_record_id_ref and a non-null approval_ticket_ref (denies with history_edit_review_recovery_object_required_before_admission and history_edit_review_attribution_missing).
interactive_rebase_sequence_review and single_branch_history_edit_review MUST pair object_model_change_class with object_model_rewrite_history.
cherry_pick_onto_alternate_target_review MUST pair object_model_change_class with object_model_replay_onto_new_target and cite a non-null replay_target_base_identity_ref.
revert_commit_preview_review MUST pair object_model_change_class with object_model_append_new_revert_commit (denies with history_edit_review_revert_commit_must_pair_with_append_new_revert_commit).

patch_series_restack_review MUST pair object_model_change_class with object_model_replay_onto_new_target, cite a non-null target_patch_stack_id_ref, and cite a non-null replay_target_base_identity_ref.
interactive_rebase_sequence_review MUST cite a non-null target_sequence_editor_plan_id_ref.
review_paused_pending_conflict MUST pair with auto_continue_blocked_pending_conflict and conflict_resolution_packet_required_pending_decision.
review_in_progress_running and review_admitted_pending_run MUST pair with auto_continue_admissible.

publish_impact_blocked_by_protected_branch_policy MUST pair with a paused or aborted lifecycle (denies with history_edit_review_publish_impact_blocked_by_protected_branch_policy on review_admitted_pending_run / review_in_progress_running).

merge_queue_impact_review_open_blocked_by_queue_freeze MUST pair with a paused or aborted lifecycle (denies with history_edit_review_merge_queue_impact_blocked_by_queue_freeze on review_admitted_pending_run / review_in_progress_running).
review_completed_recovery_object_minted MUST cite a non-null completed_at and a non-null recovery_object_record_id_ref.
review_aborted_rolled_back_to_recovery_object MUST cite a non-null aborted_at and a non-null recovery_object_record_id_ref (denies with history_edit_review_abort_recovery_object_required).
review_archived_tombstone MUST cite a non-null archived_at.
Non-terminal lifecycles MUST cite null completed_at, null aborted_at, and null archived_at.

history_edit_review_record.description: Row shape consumed by the history-edit review surface, the cherry-pick / revert review surface, the patch-series restack panel, the change-stack panel, the source-control panel, the AI branch-agent panel, the support / export bundle, and the audit lane. Exactly one row per history-edit review identity.

denial_reason.description: Required (non-null) when history_edit_review_audit_event_id_value is history_edit_review_audit_denial_emitted. Null otherwise.

allOf.description: denial_reason is required (non-null) when the event id is history_edit_review_audit_denial_emitted and MUST be null otherwise.

history_edit_review_audit_event_record.description: Audit-event row on the history_edit_review stream.
